ab: Smtrung ku sunan gbiyan kusun hug?
ch: W:我和您約明天下午好嗎?
en: Can I make an appointment with you tomorrow afternoon?

ab: Tduwa hmi! Smtrung ta inu?
ch: M:可以，我們約哪裡見面?
en: Sure, where should we meet?

ab: Smtrung ta sapah pyasan hug? Ru-ing ta.
ch: W:我們約學校好嗎?我們要錄影。
en: How about meeting at school? We need to shoot a video.

ab: Saw kiya do musa ta pslian , plukus ku lukus sbiyaw musa.
ch: M:那去聚會所好了，我會穿族服去。
en: Then let’s go to the community center. I’ll wear folk costume.

ab: Tnphpah kana ka phpah snegil alang ta o suyang balay qtaan, taga emphpah siida do o miyah miying sunan wah!
ch: W: 我們部落的櫻花盛開很漂亮。等花開的時候你來找我吧!
en: The cherry blossoms in our tribe are beautiful when they bloom. Come find me when the flowers bloom!

ab: Emptaga dhuq srnabaw na ， uxay suqi bsiyaq balay da!
ch: M: 那要等到春天，太晚了吧!
en: That would have to wait until spring. It’s too late, isn’t it?

ab: Saw kiya do smgasuc siida ka miyah su da haw!
ch: W: 那你年祭的時候來吧!
en: Then come during our smgasuc!

ab: Malu wah! Bsaun mu balay lnglungan.
ch: M: 好啊!我很期待!
en: Alright! I’m looking forward to it!

ab: Hyaun ka musa su nniqan alang hug?
ch: W: 請問你為甚麼要搬回部落生活?
en: May I ask why you decided to move back to the tribe?

ab: Musa ku tmgsa patas hiya.
ch: M: 我要回去教書。
en: I want to return to teach at the local school.

ab: Ma uxay mniqan paru alang tmgsa patas?
ch: W: 為甚麼不在都市教書?
en: Why not teach in the city?

ab: Yasa lnglungun mu balay ka alang mu, tay saw tduwa smbrinah alang mu nanaq.
ch: M: 因為我懷念我的故鄉，也希望能回饋部落。
en: Because I miss my hometown and I also want to give back to the tribe.

ab: Mkla su bi tminun, ima ka tnegsa sunan?
ch: M:你很會織布，是誰教你的?
en: You’re very skilled at weaving, who taught you?

ab: Bubu rudan mu, hiya balay mkla bi tminun mniq alang ta.
ch: W:是我的奶奶，她是我們部落最會織布的人。
en: It was my grandmother, she is the most skilled weaver in our tribe.

ab: Ma su kmsluhay balay tminun?
ch: M:你怎麼會想要學織布?
en: How did you develop an interest in learning weaving?

ab: Gaya ta ka tminun , mkpeiyux ku pllutuc ka gaya ta.
ch: W:織布是我們的文化，我想要讓文化延續。
en: Weaving is a part of our culture, and I want to ensure its continuity.

ab: Malu bi mahun ka sinaw balay nii.
ch: M:這個小米酒真好喝。
en: This millet wine is delicious.

ab: Snalu mu nanaq wah!
ch: W:是我自己釀的喔!
en: I made it myself!

ab: Ma su mkla balay, bsiyaq smalu sinaw nii?
ch: M:你真厲害，這要釀很久嗎?
en: You’re really talented. Does it take a long time to make?

ab: Ini, saw hari kingal jiyax iyax sngayan do malu da.
ch: W:不用，大約一周就好了。
en: No, it only takes about a week.
